title: Beijing
subtitle: Beijing - 5 routes
meta: China - axis, palaces, hutongs, and long day trips
practicalNote: April-May and September-October are gentler for long walks. In summer, start earlier and leave room for rain; in winter, bring a warm layer. Check Palace Museum booking and Tiananmen access before leaving the hotel.

title: Seoul
subtitle: Seoul - 5 routes
meta: South Korea - palaces, neighborhoods, markets, and river
practicalNote: April-May and September-October are usually best for long walks. Summer is hot and rainy, winter is cold; check weather and fine dust before a long outdoor route.
